subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass is revealed to be a Yugoloth, a type of demon known for making contracts.
source_quote: revealing that the 'half-elf' is actually a Yugoloth, a type of demon known for making contracts

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass speaks of the endless blood war.
source_quote: Maram il Vass, now revealed, speaks of the 'endless blood war'

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass identifies Felkur and knows about a group that wants him.
source_quote: immediately identifies Felkur, knowing about a group that wants him

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass confirms he has the Drow named Xaven, whom he acquired from fire giants.
source_quote: Maram confirms he has the Drow named Xaven, whom he acquired from fire giants

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass offers to exchange Xaven for Felkur, citing a profitable exchange with the group that wants Felkur.
source_quote: Maram il Vass offers to exchange Xaven for Felkur, citing a profitable exchange with the group that wants Felkur

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram suggests trading Bramgrim instead of Felkur.
source_quote: Maram suggests trading Bramgrim instead

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass offers Xaven for 10,000 gold pieces or two rare magical items.
source_quote: Maram il Vass then offers Xaven for 10,000 gold pieces or two rare magical items

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass reluctantly agrees to the party's request for privacy.
source_quote: Maram il Vass reluctantly agrees to their privacy

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass offers a side office for the party's private discussion.
source_quote: offering a side office

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass presents a contract for the privacy agreement.
source_quote: Maram il Vass presents a contract for their privacy agreement

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur considers using his infusion ability to create fake rare magical items that only last eight hours.
source_quote: Felkur considers using his infusion ability to create fake rare magical items that only last eight hours

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim vehemently refuses the trade of Felkur.
source_quote: with Bramgrim vehemently refusing

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim casts True Seeing to reveal Maram il Vass's true form.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts True Seeing, revealing that the 'half-elf' is actually a Yugoloth

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan is a commoner enslaved by Maram il Vass for five years after being captured by orcs.
source_quote: A commoner enslaved by Maram il Vass for five years after being captured by orcs

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan shares vital information about Maram il Vass, the Drow prisoner named Xaven Tanor'this, and the palace's defenses.
source_quote: she shares vital information about Maram il Vass, the Drow prisoner named Xaven Tanor'this, and the palace's defenses

subject: Teegan
fact: Teegan refuses to follow the party further into the palace.
source_quote: She refuses to follow the party further into the palace

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan is Teegan's brother, also enslaved by Maram il Vass.
source_quote: Teegan's brother, also enslaved by Maram il Vass

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan is found in a state of mental breakdown with self-inflicted wounds from shoving a pointed stick into both of his ears.
source_quote: rocking and with self-inflicted wounds from shoving a pointed stick into both of his ears

subject: Drystan
fact: Drystan is unable to communicate.
source_quote: He is unable to communicate

subject: Gabberforth
fact: Gabberforth is a deep gnome who serves as a guard and majordomo for Maram il Vass.
source_quote: A deep gnome who serves as a guard and majordomo for Maram il Vass

subject: Gabberforth
fact: Gabberforth guards the entrance to the palace accompanied by a shield guardian.
source_quote: guards the entrance to the palace, accompanied by a shield guardian

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is a Drow held captive by Maram il Vass.
source_quote: A Drow held captive by Maram il Vass

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this was brought to Maram il Vass by fire giants while unconscious and in bad shape.
source_quote: brought to him by fire giants while unconscious and in bad shape

subject: Daein
fact: Daein casts Pass Without Trace to allow the party to move stealthily through the tunnels.
source_quote: Cast by Daein to allow the party to move stealthily through the tunnels

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas casts Hunter's Mark on one of the Barlgura demons.
source_quote: Cast by Akritas on one of the Barlgura demons

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas uses Favorite Foe in conjunction with Hunter's Mark.
source_quote: Used by Akritas in conjunction with Hunter's Mark

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas levels up to 11th level.
source_quote: upon leveling up to 11th level

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas gains the Volley ability upon leveling up.
source_quote: A new ability gained by Akritas upon leveling up to 11th level

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas considers taking the Silence spell upon leveling up.
source_quote: A third-level spell Akritas considers taking upon leveling up

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear is a loyal companion to the party who participates in combat.
source_quote: A loyal companion to the party who participates in combat

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear was attacked and knocked prone during the battle with the Barlgura demons.
source_quote: it was attacked and knocked prone

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear recovered using its second wind.
source_quote: recovered using its second wind

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear levels up with the party to 11th level.
source_quote: It levels up with the party to 11th level

subject: Barlgura
fact: Two ugly-looking demons ambushed the party.
source_quote: Two ugly-looking demons that ambushed the party

subject: Barlgura
fact: The Barlgura demons were interested in recapturing Teegan and Drystan, whom they called 'the pets'.
source_quote: interested in recapturing Teegan and Drystan, whom they called 'the pets'

subject: Barlgura
fact: The Barlgura demons can climb and attack with tormenting bites and thrash attacks.
source_quote: can climb and attack with tormenting bites and thrash attacks

subject: Barlgura
fact: The Barlgura demons were defeated by the party and turned into dust and ochre.
source_quote: They were defeated by the party and turned into dust and ochre

subject: Yugoloth
fact: Maram il Vass is a Yugoloth.
source_quote: revealing that the 'half-elf' is actually a Yugoloth

subject: Shield Guardian
fact: A Shield Guardian stands sentry at the entrance to Maram il Vass's palace.
source_quote: A construct that stands sentry at the entrance to Maram il Vass's palace

subject: Den of the Whispered Word
fact: The Den of the Whispered Word is an expansive cavern housing Maram il Vass's palace.
source_quote: An expansive cavern housing Maram il Vass's palace

subject: Den of the Whispered Word
fact: The Den of the Whispered Word is lit by blue, green, and purple fairy fire.
source_quote: lit by blue, green, and purple fairy fire

subject: Den of the Whispered Word
fact: The central building in the Den of the Whispered Word stands 50 feet high.
source_quote: The central building stands 50 feet high

subject: Den of the Whispered Word
fact: The Den of the Whispered Word is flanked by two smaller 30-foot buildings.
source_quote: flanked by two smaller 30-foot buildings

subject: Den of the Whispered Word
fact: The Den of the Whispered Word serves as an extra-planar marketplace.
source_quote: It serves as an extra-planar marketplace

subject: Entrance Foyer
fact: The Entrance Foyer features two large tapestries depicting the half-elf's rise to power.
source_quote: featuring two large tapestries depicting the half-elf's rise to power

subject: Entrance Foyer
fact: The Entrance Foyer has a hallway lined with tall vases of fresh flowers.
source_quote: a hallway lined with tall vases of fresh flowers

subject: Entrance Foyer
fact: The Entrance Foyer has glass containers holding small, unusual creatures such as fish, birds, and reptiles.
source_quote: glass containers holding small, unusual creatures such as fish, birds, and reptiles

subject: Grand Chamber
fact: The Grand Chamber has a polished white marble floor streaked with red and black.
source_quote: The floor is polished white marble streaked with red and black

subject: Grand Chamber
fact: A large desk of unusual purple wood sits in the middle of the Grand Chamber.
source_quote: A large desk of unusual purple wood sits in the middle

subject: Grand Chamber
fact: Two brass doors lead to southeast and southwest corners of the Grand Chamber.
source_quote: two brass doors lead to southeast and southwest corners

subject: Side Office
fact: The Side Office is an office within Maram il Vass's palace where the party is directed to discuss their negotiation privately.
source_quote: An office within Maram il Vass's palace where the party is directed to discuss their negotiation privately

subject: Cave
fact: The Cave is a defensible cave with a single entrance found by Bramgrim.
source_quote: A defensible cave with a single entrance, found by Bramgrim

subject: Cave
fact: The Cave features a stalactite.
source_quote: and features a stalactite

subject: Howling Pits
fact: The Howling Pits are a section of the Underdark tunnels characterized by persistent, mournful winds.
source_quote: A section of the Underdark tunnels characterized by persistent, mournful winds

subject: Howling Pits
fact: The Howling Pits previously contained crazed giants, poisonous fungi, and bottomless pits.
source_quote: contained crazed giants, poisonous fungi, and bottomless pits

subject: Alarm Trap
fact: An improvised trap made of string and a loud metal item was set up by the party at the entrance of the cave.
source_quote: An improvised trap made of string and a loud metal item, set up by the party at the entrance of the cave

subject: Pointed Stick
fact: A pointed stick was the only weapon Drystan and Teegan possessed during their escape.
source_quote: the only weapon Drystan and Teegan possessed during their escape

subject: Pointed Stick
fact: Drystan shoved the pointed stick into both of his ears.
source_quote: shoved it into both of his ears

subject: Brass Doors
fact: The Brass Doors are ornate doors of beaten brass serving as the only entrance to Maram il Vass's palace.
source_quote: Ornate doors of beaten brass, serving as the only entrance to Maram il Vass's palace

subject: Brass Doors
fact: The Brass Doors are carved with self-adulating images of a half-elf in various stages of becoming rich and powerful.
source_quote: carved with self-adulating images of a half-elf in various stages of becoming rich and powerful

subject: Tapestries
fact: Two large tapestries in the entrance foyer depict the story of a self-made half-elf of extraordinary influence.
source_quote: depicting the story of a self-made half-elf of extraordinary influence

subject: Vases with Fresh Flowers
fact: Tall vases lining the hallway in Maram il Vass's palace are filled with fresh flowers.
source_quote: filled with fresh flowers

subject: Glass Containers with Creatures
fact: Glass containers in the hallway of Maram il Vass's palace are filled with various small and unusual creatures such as fish, birds, reptiles, and other curiosities.
source_quote: filled with various small and unusual creatures such as fish, birds, reptiles, and other curiosities

subject: Desk of Purple Wood
fact: A large desk made of an unusual purple wood is situated in the middle of the grand chamber.
source_quote: A large desk made of an unusual purple wood, situated in the middle of the grand chamber

subject: Contract
fact: Maram il Vass presents a contract for the party's privacy agreement.
source_quote: Maram il Vass presents a contract for their privacy agreement

subject: Contract
fact: The party scrutinizes the contract for loopholes to ensure Maram won't spy on them or disrupt their deliberations.
source_quote: which the party scrutinizes for loopholes to ensure Maram won't spy on them or disrupt their deliberations

subject: Entry to Palace
fact: The party gains entry to Maram il Vass's palace.
source_quote: The party gains entry to Maram il Vass's palace

subject: True Seeing Cast
fact: Bramgrim casts True Seeing.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts True Seeing

subject: Rejection of Trade
fact: The party rejects the trade of Felkur.
source_quote: The party rejects the trade of Felkur

subject: Privacy Agreement
fact: The party negotiates the terms of the contract to ensure Maram won't spy on them or disrupt their deliberations.
source_quote: The party negotiates the terms of the contract to ensure Maram won't spy on them or disrupt their deliberations

subject: Demons Revealed
fact: Two more demons are revealed to be in the back room as the party prepares to enter the side office.
source_quote: Two more demons are revealed to be in the back room as the party prepares to enter the side office

subject: Long Rest
fact: The party takes a long rest in the Cave.
source_quote: where the party takes a long rest

subject: Barlgura Combat
fact: The party defeats the Barlgura demons.
source_quote: They were defeated by the party

subject: Level Up
fact: Akritas levels up to 11th level.
source_quote: upon leveling up to 11th level

subject: Level Up
fact: Bramgrim levels up.
source_quote: Bramgrim gains upon leveling up

subject: Level Up
fact: The Owlbear levels up with the party to 11th level.
source_quote: It levels up with the party to 11th level

subject: Drow Release
fact: Maram il Vass attempts to negotiate the Drow's release in exchange for Felkur or 10,000 gold pieces/two rare magical items.
source_quote: attempts to negotiate the Drow's release in exchange for Felkur or 10,000 gold pieces/two rare magical items

subject: Felkur's Problem
fact: Maram il Vass offers to help Felkur with his problem in exchange for something.
source_quote: Maram offers to help Felkur with his problem in exchange for something

subject: Xaven's Fate
fact: The party is seeking to rescue or retrieve Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: The party is seeking to rescue or retrieve him

subject: Group Seeking Felkur
fact: Maram il Vass knows about a group that wants Felkur.
source_quote: knowing about a group that wants him

subject: Blood War
fact: Maram il Vass speaks of the endless blood war.
source_quote: speaks of the 'endless blood war'
